mapper.select: SELECT a.active_cat_id, a.user_id, m.category_id, m.category_name, m.color_index FROM active_categories AS a JOIN categories_master AS m ON a.category_id = m.category_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.active_cat_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories_master (user_id, category_name, color_index, is_active) VALUES(#{userId},#{categoryName},#{colorIndex}, true)
mapper.update: UPDATE categories_master SET is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
